# Pull Request Checklist

- [ ] Scope is clear and approved.
- [ ] Phase boundary is respected.
- [ ] `data/raw/` was not modified.
- [ ] Scientific claims are supported or marked as unverified.
- [ ] Learning gates were not marked Passed without evidence.
- [ ] ADRs were not marked Accepted without approval.
- [ ] Tests/checks were run.
- [ ] `STATE.md` was updated if meaningful.
